name: linSetChecksumCompatibility
title: linSetChecksumCompatibility
description: Switches the checksum calculation model of all frames that have at least one subscribed LIN 1.x node to the classic model.
This function may only be called in the event procedure on preStart.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: The number of the LIN channel for which the checksum compatibility should be enabled.

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.
